install: if [ -f "${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/activate" ]; then source "${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/activate"; elif [ -f "${workspaceFolder}/venv/bin/activate" ]; then source "${workspaceFolder}/venv/bin/activate"; elif ! command -v hermes >/dev/null 2>&1; then cd "${workspaceFolder}" && ./setup-hermes.sh; fi && hermes --version
